_README: Global spoil/dump rates. Two billing models: per-cu_yd (Upland's, Northwin) and per-tandem-load (Browns River). For Upland's + Northwin, 1 cu_yd = 1 ton (1:1 — Michael's rule), so $10/cu_yd === $10/ton. Browns River is $90 per tandem (~10 cu_yd ≈ 10-11 tons). Import (delivery of clean fill) is NOT a flat fee — it's material × truck hours in the Materials + Trucking buckets.

browns_river.name: Browns River Pit
browns_river.notes: $90 per tandem load (10 cu_yd, roughly 10-11 tons). Compute loads = ceil(spoil_cu_yd / 10); cost = loads × 90.

uplands.name: Upland's Gravel
uplands.notes: $10 per cu_yd (1:1 with tons). Default for central Vancouver Island jobs.

northwin.name: Northwin Gravel
northwin.notes: $10 per cu_yd (1:1 with tons). Alternate central VI option.
